goal:
Build a FastAPI backend for a task management system.

Requirements:
- CRUD APIs for tasks
- SQLite database
- Proper folder structure
- Add requirements.txt
- Run the server
- If errors occur, fix them automatically

Do not stop until the app runs successfully.

plan.title: Create the project structure with app/, app/api/, app/db/, app/models/, and app/schemas/ packages plus __init__.py files
Add requirements.txt with FastAPI, Uvicorn, SQLAlchemy, and Pydantic dependencies needed for a SQLite-backed API
Implement SQLite database configuration and session management in app/db/database.py
Create the Task SQLAlchemy model in app/models/task.py and initialize table metadata
Define Pydantic schemas for task create, update, and response payloads in app/schemas/task.py
Implement FastAPI CRUD endpoints for tasks in app/api/tasks.py covering create, list, retrieve, update, and delete
Create app/main.py to assemble the FastAPI app, include the task router, and create database tables on startup
Install dependencies, run the FastAPI server with Uvicorn, and verify the app starts successfully
If startup or runtime errors occur, fix the code or configuration and rerun the server until it launches cleanly
